## _Obituary_

## _Obituary_

I think this is the right record but I have his service number as 302120.
1st/4th Battalion Gloucestershire Regiment.
(144th Infantry Brigade 48th (South Midand TF ) Division)
Killed in action on the Somme on Friday the 13th April 1917
James Drayton was the 22 year old son of Henry and Annie Drayton, of Seavington, Somerset.
He has no known grave, being among the 73,412 ‘Missing’ commemorated on the Thiepval Memorial
Panel 5A and 5B.
